# Discussion {#sec-discussion}

<!-- TODO: Develop this section with substantive discussion of findings, limitations, and future work. -->

## Relevance of Results

<!-- Content to be developed: why incidence-guided designs matter for spatial CRT practice, implications for trial design in public health -->

## Limitations

<!-- Content to be developed:
  - Oracle MLE assumption (true spillover covariate known)
  - Fixed true treatment effect (tau = 1.0)
  - Equal cluster populations in Poisson mode
  - Regular lattice grid (vs. irregular real-world geographies)
  - Single grid size (G=10, N=100)
-->

## Future Considerations

<!-- Content to be developed:
  - Non-oracle estimation (omitting spillover covariate)
  - Varying tau across scenarios
  - Heterogeneous population sizes
  - Irregular spatial geometries
  - Larger grid sizes and sensitivity analysis
  - Integration with real NC county/census tract data
-->
